name: codex-lark-plugin
description: Feishu-oriented Codex plugin for team knowledge retrieval, summaries, recent updates, and document diffs.

interface.shortDescription: Query project docs, summaries, recent updates, and document diffs
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex with Feishu-style team knowledge so developers can retrieve project docs, inspect summaries, browse recent updates, and compare document revisions through structured MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Find the latest product and project docs for a team
List the most relevant docs for a project or keyword
Compare how a team document changed between two updates
